item.title: XXY Model: The Six Vertex model solution
item.description:
This is the begining of a sequence of studies about the XXY model. Of course, one should note that we will not be ttalking about the XXY model in this first post and that the title seems somewhat missleading. However, there is a deep connection between those models and the analitical results for the Six Vertex model will gain a great importance once the connection is elucidated. With that in mind, we can concentract ourselves on the analitical features of this model and take a step at the time.

The ice rule

The six vertex model is a classical model initially created for describing the properties of ice lattices. The atoms of oxygen are arranged in a tetrahedral way, so that it interacts effectivally with 4 hydrogens. Each oxygen is separated by a distance which is about 3 times the bond distance for the O-H bond in a gas. Its easy to imagine that the hydrogen will likely choose one of the oxygens to stay closer. We can assign to each O-O line an vector which is parallel to the dipole moment generated by the casual “hydrogen afinnity”.

[image here: H2O lattice becoming a six vertex]

We shall now reffer to the oxygen as a vertex as it can be viewed as the encounter of 4 “dipolar lines”. Because we know that ice is electrically neutral, we can impose that each vertex should not hold a great effective charge. This is, at each vertex there should be no charge divergence, if a line enters a vertexs, it should also leave the vertex. That leads us to the main feature of our model, the ice rule. The number of lines that enters a vertex should be equal to the ones that exit. Initially our model could describe $2^4 = 16$ configurations for each vertex, now only 6 of those satisfies the ice rule.

[image here: configurations excluded and included by the ice rules]

item.title: First Post
item.description:
Hello World!

This is a test post, please don’t take it searious. I will insert some content here just to fill it up.

Content

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nulla imperdiet dolor venenatis, tincidunt ipsum sed, lacinia ex. Integer ut nisl pharetra, hendrerit dolor nec, imperdiet diam. Ut id ex ut ex rhoncus viverra finibus nec libero. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sed vulputate erat, aliquet varius lectus. Class aptent taciti sociosqu ad litora torquent per conubia nostra, per inceptos himenaeos. Sed pellentesque condimentum turpis, sit amet iaculis metus fringilla ac. Proin ut cursus neque. Praesent nec finibus augue. Morbi suscipit lectus vitae sem dapibus, et volutpat felis lacinia. Phasellus tempus faucibus gravida. Suspendisse a commodo metus. Nullam vitae pretium sapien. Suspendisse pulvinar sapien at accumsan sagittis.

Duis feugiat vestibulum arcu id fermentum. Quisque quis enim porta, ornare mauris non, rutrum odio. Phasellus efficitur, risus eu condimentum efficitur, urna orci mattis libero, eleifend accumsan lacus turpis efficitur neque. Quisque in lacus quis turpis placerat dictum. Aenean ornare sit amet elit ac ullamcorper. Vestibulum urna dui, molestie ut fermentum in, vulputate eu dolor. Ut sollicitudin eros eu nisi mattis egestas. Proin in elementum dolor. Aenean elit turpis, porttitor ut magna id, blandit fermentum sapien. Ut lobortis nunc blandit convallis faucibus. Aenean non porttitor mauris. Quisque non dolor nec urna auctor vehicula. Sed sed pharetra dolor. Vestibulum viverra tempus ante non porta.

Fusce fringilla, enim sed ultricies ornare, lectus lacus posuere dolor, vel sodales nisl enim nec ante. Cras feugiat nulla velit, nec malesuada diam pulvinar a. Maecenas nunc risus, aliquam ut viverra id, pulvinar mollis ligula. Proin non massa orci. Suspendisse placerat bibendum blandit. Duis iaculis porta turpis vel ullamcorper. Nam felis quam, finibus ut mi eget, luctus fermentum lacus.

Vivamus at quam magna. Nulla finibus felis quis pulvinar mattis. Donec mattis enim turpis, vitae vehicula est malesuada sit amet. Pellentesque mollis placerat elit fringilla pulvinar. Morbi condimentum nisl sit amet metus venenatis, in gravida libero volutpat. Maecenas non massa congue, maximus turpis sed, maximus metus. Nunc non nulla sed mi facilisis pulvinar et ac tortor. Phasellus gravida non tellus id cursus. Vestibulum mauris lectus, venenatis vel venenatis laoreet, aliquam et mauris. Proin pretium ante sapien, consectetur egestas eros ornare nec.

Donec tristique quam tortor, sed suscipit nibh rutrum ut. Proin et aliquet ante. Mauris vestibulum, mauris a ultrices dictum, ipsum risus porta ex, vitae pulvinar arcu ligula vel dui. Donec vel purus sit amet est accumsan tempus ac ultrices arcu. Morbi lobortis dolor eu nisl porta, varius sollicitudin ligula elementum. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante ipsum primis in faucibus. Etiam nunc purus, iaculis non pharetra at, pharetra eu elit. Nunc consectetur euismod ex et imperdiet.
